requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements — Saudi Electricity Company (SEC) Grid Code and ECRA Regulations
requirement_topic.zh: 并网要求——沙特电力公司（SEC）电网规范及ECRA法规
requirement_topic.zht: 並網要求——沙特電力公司（SEC）電網規範及ECRA法規

summary.en: BESS installations connected to the Saudi electricity grid must comply with the Saudi Electricity Company (SEC) Grid Code and the technical requirements of the Electricity and Cogeneration Regulatory Authority (ECRA). The SEC Grid Code specifies requirements for power quality, frequency response, voltage regulation, fault ride-through capability, protection relay settings, anti-islanding, and communication interfaces for generation and storage assets connected to the grid. Grid-scale and behind-the-meter BESS projects require SEC technical review and approval prior to grid connection. ECRA oversees licensing of electricity-generating and storage facilities and may impose additional technical standards.
summary.zh: 接入沙特电网的BESS装置须符合沙特电力公司（SEC）电网规范及电力与联合发电监管局（ECRA）的技术要求。SEC电网规范就电能质量、频率响应、电压调节、故障穿越能力、保护继电器整定、防孤岛以及与电网连接的发电和储能资产的通信接口作出规定。电网侧及表后BESS项目均须在并网前取得SEC技术审查与批准。ECRA负责电力发电和储能设施的许可证管理，并可能施加额外技术标准要求。
summary.zht: 接入沙特電網的BESS裝置須符合沙特電力公司（SEC）電網規範及電力與聯合發電監管局（ECRA）的技術要求。SEC電網規範就電能質量、頻率響應、電壓調節、故障穿越能力、保護繼電器整定、防孤島以及與電網連接的發電和儲能資產的通訊接口作出規定。電網側及表後BESS項目均須在並網前取得SEC技術審查與批准。ECRA負責電力發電和儲能設施的許可證管理，並可能施加額外技術標準要求。

standards_or_laws: SEC Grid Code — Saudi Electricity Company Grid Connection Code (transmission and distribution network requirements for storage and generation assets)
ECRA — Electricity and Cogeneration Regulatory Authority licensing requirements for electricity storage facilities
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (referenced in project technical specifications)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). Grid operators in China also reference NB/T 42090 and NB/T 42091 (Energy Storage Converter technical standards). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised testing and approval procedures. These Chinese grid-connection standards, while technically comprehensive, are not accepted by SEC as equivalent to SEC Grid Code compliance.
summary.zh: 中国储能系统的并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。中国电网运营商还参考NB/T 42090和NB/T 42091（储能变流器技术标准）。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权的测试和审批程序获得电网运营商认可。上述中国并网标准虽具技术完整性，但不被SEC接受为符合SEC电网规范的等效依据。
summary.zht: 中國儲能系統的並網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。中國電網運營商還參考NB/T 42090和NB/T 42091（儲能變流器技術標準）。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權的測試和審批程序獲得電網運營商認可。上述中國並網標準雖具技術完整性，但不被SEC接受為符合SEC電網規範的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: SEC Grid Code compliance is a project-specific, jurisdiction-specific requirement that cannot be met by holding Chinese grid-connection certificates. Chinese BESS power conversion systems (PCS) must meet SEC Grid Code technical specifications including frequency ride-through (47.5–51.5 Hz operational range typical for Saudi grid), voltage ride-through, anti-islanding protection per IEC 62116, reactive power capability, and communication protocol compatibility (typically IEC 61850 or DNP3 as specified by SEC). PCS inverter firmware and protection relay settings must be configured specifically for Saudi grid conditions. SEC technical approval and ECRA licensing are separate processes. Verify current SEC Grid Code version and ECRA licensing requirements directly with SEC and ECRA before project commencement.
gap.zh: 差距：遵守SEC电网规范是针对具体项目和司法管辖区的要求，持有中国并网证书不能满足此要求。中国BESS储能变流器（PCS）须满足SEC电网规范的技术规格，包括频率穿越（沙特电网通常运行范围47.5–51.5 Hz）、电压穿越、符合IEC 62116的防孤岛保护、无功功率能力以及通信协议兼容性（通常为SEC指定的IEC 61850或DNP3）。PCS逆变器固件和保护继电器整定须专门针对沙特电网条件进行配置。SEC技术审批与ECRA许可为独立流程。请在项目启动前直接向SEC和ECRA核实现行电网规范版本及许可证要求。
gap.zht: 差距：遵守SEC電網規範是針對具體項目和司法管轄區的要求，持有中國並網證書不能滿足此要求。中國BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須滿足SEC電網規範的技術規格，包括頻率穿越（沙特電網通常運行範圍47.5–51.5 Hz）、電壓穿越、符合IEC 62116的防孤島保護、無功功率能力以及通訊協議相容性（通常為SEC指定的IEC 61850或DNP3）。PCS逆變器固件和保護繼電器整定須專門針對沙特電網條件進行配置。SEC技術審批與ECRA許可為獨立流程。請在項目啟動前直接向SEC和ECRA核實現行電網規範版本及許可證要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SEC Grid Code compliance and ECRA licensing are required for all grid-connected BESS in Saudi Arabia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558 grid-connection compliance and NEA approval do not satisfy Saudi SEC Grid Code requirements. BESS systems exported to Saudi Arabia for grid connection must be designed and configured specifically for SEC Grid Code technical requirements and must obtain SEC technical approval and ECRA licensing. Engage SEC and ECRA at the earliest project stage to determine applicable technical standards and licensing timeline.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558并网合规及NEA审批不满足沙特SEC电网规范要求。出口至沙特并网的BESS系统，须专门针对SEC电网规范技术要求进行设计和配置，并取得SEC技术审批及ECRA许可证。应在项目最早阶段与SEC和ECRA接触，以确定适用技术标准和许可证时间表。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558並網合規及NEA審批不滿足沙特SEC電網規範要求。出口至沙特並網的BESS系統，須專門針對SEC電網規範技術要求進行設計和配置，並取得SEC技術審批及ECRA許可證。應在項目最早階段與SEC和ECRA接觸，以確定適用技術標準和許可證時間表。
